channel.title: GitHub Nextflow Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Nextflow in GitHub

item.title: nf-core/modules
item.description: Repository to host tool-specific module files for the Nextflow DSL2 community!

item.title: nf-core/sarek
item.description: Analysis pipeline to detect germline or somatic variants (pre-processing, variant calling and annotation) from WGS / targeted sequencing

item.title: nf-core/rnaseq
item.description: RNA sequencing analysis pipeline using STAR, RSEM, HISAT2 or Salmon with gene/isoform counts and extensive quality control.

item.title: nf-core/variantbenchmarking
item.description: A nextflow variant benchmarking pipeline - premature

item.title: nf-core/datasync
item.description: nf-core/datasync is a system operation pipeline that provides several workflows for handling system operation / automation tasks

item.title: uclahs-cds/pipeline-Nextflow-module
item.description: Set of commonly used Nextflow modules

item.title: nf-core/bacass
item.description: Simple bacterial assembly and annotation pipeline

item.title: nf-core/metaboigniter
item.description: Pre-processing of mass spectrometry-based metabolomics data with quantification and identification based on MS1 and MS2 data.

item.title: nf-core/rnasplice
item.description: rnasplice is a bioinformatics pipeline for RNA-seq alternative splicing analysis

item.title: nf-core/metatdenovo
item.description: Assembly and annotation of metatranscriptomic data, both prokaryotic and eukaryotic.

item.title: nf-core/hlatyping
item.description: Precision HLA typing from next-generation sequencing data

item.title: nf-core/nanoseq
item.description: Nanopore demultiplexing, QC and alignment pipeline

item.title: nf-core/nascent
item.description: Nascent Transcription Processing Pipeline

item.title: nf-core/raredisease
item.description: Call and score variants from WGS/WES of rare disease patients.

item.title: nf-core/proteinfold
item.description: Protein 3D structure prediction pipeline

item.title: nf-core/funcscan
item.description: (Meta-)genome screening for functional and natural product gene sequences

item.title: nf-core/epitopeprediction
item.description: A bioinformatics best-practice analysis pipeline for epitope prediction and annotation

item.title: nf-core/demultiplex
item.description: Demultiplexing pipeline for sequencing data

item.title: nf-core/rnafusion
item.description: RNA-seq analysis pipeline for detection gene-fusions

item.title: nf-core/methylseq
item.description: Methylation (Bisulfite-Sequencing) analysis pipeline using Bismark or bwa-meth + MethylDackel

item.title: nf-core/eager
item.description: A fully reproducible and state-of-the-art ancient DNA analysis pipeline

item.title: nf-core/multiplesequencealign
item.description: A pipeline to run and systematically evaluate Multiple Sequence Alignment (MSA) methods.

item.title: nf-core/pangenome
item.description: Renders a collection of sequences into a pangenome graph.

item.title: nf-core/circrna
item.description: circRNA quantification, differential expression analysis and miRNA target prediction of RNA-Seq data

item.title: nf-core/rnavar
item.description: gatk4 RNA variant calling pipeline
